Acquiring data from primary or secondary data sources and maintaining databases. Qualifications Education details Required Skills Skills related to data analysis and statistical techniques. Preferred Skills Additional skills that may enhance the role. Pay range and compensation package Pay range or salary or compensation Equal Opportunity Statement Include a statement on commitment to diversity and inclusivity.

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.description: Job Overview DESIGN RANK INC. is seeking a meticulous and insightful Data Analyst to join our innovative team. This is a Full-time position based in Dallas, Texas, United States . As a specialist in custom web design, social media management, and online branding, we are looking for a professional who can translate complex data into actionable strategies that enhance our clients' online presence and drive sales. The ideal candidate will have a passion for data and a keen eye for detail, helping to shape the strategic direction of our marketing plans and turning valuable insights into client success stories. This role offers a competitive wage of $25.00 - $35.00 USD per hour . Responsibilities Analyse website traffic, user behaviour, and conversion data to identify key trends and opportunities for optimisation. Track, measure, and report on the performance of social media campaigns, online branding initiatives, and digital marketing strategies against established key performance indicators (KPIs). Develop and maintain comprehensive dashboards and reports to visualise data and communicate performance to internal teams and clients. Translate raw data into clear, concise, and actionable insights that inform strategic decision-making. Collaborate closely with our web design and marketing teams to provide data-driven recommendations for improving customer engagement and campaign effectiveness. Conduct A/B testing and other statistical analyses to evaluate and refine marketing tactics. Ensure the integrity and accuracy of data collected from various sources, implementing processes for quality assurance. Qualifications Proven experience working as a Data Analyst, preferably within a digital marketing or technology-focused environment. Strong proficiency in data analysis and querying languages, such as SQL, Python, or R. Demonstrable experience with data visualisation tools like Tableau, Power BI, or Google Data Studio. Excellent analytical skills with the ability to collect, organise, analyse, and disseminate significant amounts of information with meticulous attention to detail. Adept at communicating complex data insights to both technical and non-technical stakeholders. A bachelor's degree in Mathematics, Economics, Computer Science, Information Management, or a related field is highly desirable. Familiarity with web analytics platforms (e.g., Google Analytics) and an understanding of digital marketing metrics would be a significant advantage. Benefits A competitive hourly wage and the opportunity to be part of a dynamic, forward-thinking company. A collaborative and supportive work environment that encourages continuous learning and professional development. The chance to work on diverse projects that have a direct and measurable impact on our clients' success. Join a creative team committed to innovation and excellence in the digital marketing industry.

jobs.title: Data Analyst 1
jobs.description: Please note that this is a contract role providing services to Samsung through external staffing partners of Allegis Global Solutions (AGS). If you are selected for this role, you will be employed by AGS and will not be an employee of Samsung Summary : Position Summary The Product Liability (PL) Data Analyst & Claim Manager is responsible for driving operational excellence across product liability claims, customer care, and business process improvement. This hybrid role combines advanced analytics, claim management, project leadership, and customer experience optimization to enhance operational performance and support strategic decision-making. The ideal candidate will leverage data-driven insights to improve claim outcomes, customer satisfaction, and overall business efficiency while serving as a key liaison between business stakeholders, customer care, legal teams, and IT. Key Responsibilities 1. Product Liability Claim Management Manage claims throughout the product liability claim lifecycle, ensuring timely review, investigation, and resolution. Coordinate with claimants, subrogation adjusters, attorneys, and internal stakeholders to gather necessary claim information and documentation. Monitor claim trends, identify recurring issues, and recommend proactive solutions to mitigate future risk. Develop and implement strategies to improve claimant satisfaction through streamlined communication and reduced claim resolution times. Support customer accommodations and claim-related inquiries as needed. 2. Data Analytics & Business Intelligence Analyze operational, claims, and customer data to identify trends, risks, and opportunities for improvement. Perform advanced statistical analysis, including regression analysis, variance analysis, and predictive modeling, to support business decisions. Develop actionable recommendations based on analytical findings. Build, maintain, and enhance dashboards and reports using Tableau, Power BI, or similar business intelligence tools. Collaborate with IT and business partners to ensure data integrity, system optimization, and effective data flow across platforms. Support cross-functional initiatives by providing meaningful data insights and performance metrics. 3. Customer Experience & Operational Excellence Analyze end-to-end customer and claim processes to identify pain points and implement effective solutions. Map customer and claim journeys to uncover process improvement opportunities and enhance operational efficiency. Develop and implement back-office strategies that improve workflow effectiveness and system utilization. Enhance customer care operations through data-driven improvements that increase response quality, service levels, and customer satisfaction. Monitor operational KPIs and recommend corrective actions to improve overall performance. 4. Quality Management & Continuous Improvement Monitor and evaluate customer interactions, claims handling activities, and service quality standards. Conduct periodic and ad hoc analyses to identify performance gaps and improvement opportunities. Perform root cause analyses to address operational inefficiencies and recurring issues. Design, document, and improve business processes, workflows, and operational procedures. Research industry trends, best practices, and emerging technologies to support innovation and continuous improvement initiatives. 5. Project Management Lead and support cross-functional projects from initiation through implementation. Develop project plans, timelines, resource requirements, and risk mitigation strategies. Track project progress, identify roadblocks, and implement corrective actions to ensure successful outcomes. Document project deliverables, lessons learned, and best practices for future application. Ensure projects align with organizational objectives and stakeholder expectations. 6. Cross-Functional Collaboration & Stakeholder Management Partner closely with Customer Care, Legal, IT, Product Development, and Operations teams to drive business objectives. Act as the primary liaison between technical teams and business stakeholders to facilitate effective communication and execution. Support strategic planning and decision-making through data-driven recommendations. Participate in cross-functional meetings and contribute operational and analytical insights. 7. Reporting & Executive Presentations Develop comprehensive reporting on operational performance, claim activity, customer experience, and risk management metrics. Create executive-level presentations that effectively communicate key findings, business insights, recommendations, and project updates. Translate complex analytical information into clear, actionable business recommendations. Ensure all reports and presentations are professional, concise, and visually impactful. Required Qualifications Education Bachelor's degree in Business Analytics, Statistics, Data Science, Finance, Engineering, Information Systems, or a related field. Technical Skills Strong SQL skills for data extraction, transformation, and analysis. Advanced analytical and problem-solving capabilities. Proficiency in statistical analysis, including regression and variance analysis. Experience with Tableau, Power BI, or other data visualization platforms. Proficiency in Python or R for data analysis and automation (Pandas preferred). Advanced Microsoft Excel skills, including VBA and automation techniques. Systems & Tools Experience with database management systems such as MySQL. Familiarity with CRM platforms, SAP, call management systems, or similar operational tools. Experience integrating data from multiple systems and sources. Professional Experience Experience in product liability, claims management, insurance operations, customer care operations, or related business functions. Proven success in business process improvement and operational optimization. Experience developing dashboards and performance reporting solutions. Strong project management experience, including planning, execution, monitoring, and stakeholder communication. Demonstrated ability to conduct root cause analysis and drive measurable business improvements. Preferred Qualifications Product Liability or Claims Management experience. Project Management certification (PMP, CAPM, Agile, or equivalent). Fluency in Korean and English. Additional Details: Location:6625 Excellence Way Plano, TX Duration:12 Months Pay Range*: $30 - $35/hr Weekly Schedule: 40 hours Job Status: Non-Exempt Application Deadline:July 14, 2026 This role is eligible for the following benefits: Medical, dental & vision Hospital plans 401(k) Retirement Plan – Pre-tax and Roth post-tax contributions available (USA) Life Insurance (Company paid Basic Life and AD&D as well as voluntary Life & AD&D for the employee and dependents) Company paid short and long-term disability Health & Dependent Care Spending Accounts (HSA & DCFSA) Employee Assistance Program Time Off/Leave(PTO, Allegis Group Paid Family Leave, Parental Leave Benefits are subject to change and may be subject to specific elections, plan, or program terms. Existing Vacancy: This posting is for an available position AGS is an Equal Opportunity Employer and will consider all applications without regard to race, sex, age, color, religion, national origin, veteran status, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, genetic information or any characteristic protected by law. If you require a reasonable accommodation related to the application or interview process due to a disability, please email accommodation@allegisglobalsolutions.com. This inbox is monitored solely for accommodation requests. For questions about open roles or to apply, please submit your application through the job posting, as this inbox is not monitored by recruiters and applications sent here will not be reviewed. In accordance with the Immigration Reform and Control Act of 1986, employment is contingent upon verification of identity and authorization to work in the United States. All persons hired will be required to complete Form I-9 and provide acceptable documentation as required by law. Please note that we may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to screen, assess, or select applicants for this position. These tools may analyze application materials and assist our team in identifying candidates whose qualifications best match the requirements of the role. If you have questions about our use of AI in the hiring process, or would like more information, please contact us. *We reserve the right to pay above or below the posted wage based on factors unrelated to protected classifications. Individual compensation offered for this position within this range will depend on many factors, including qualifications, skills, relevant experience, job knowledge, geographic location, internal equity, and other pertinent job-related factors. San Francisco Candidates only: Pursuant to the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records. City of Los Angeles Candidates only: We will consider for employment all qualified applicants, including those with criminal histories, in a manner consistent with the requirements of applicable state and local laws, including the City of Los Angeles’ Fair Chance Initiative for Hiring.

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.description: Our client is seeking a Data Analyst to join a high-impact Revenue Analytics team that serves as a bridge between Finance, Technology, and Clinical Operations. This role will help deliver critical insights into revenue cycle performance, reimbursement trends, cash collections, and operational decision-making. The ideal candidate is highly proficient in SQL, comfortable working with large datasets, and enjoys partnering with business stakeholders to solve complex data challenges. Healthcare industry experience is strongly preferred. Responsibilities Analyze revenue, financial, and operational data to support business and clinical stakeholders. Write, modify, and troubleshoot complex SQL queries and stored procedures. Identify and resolve data quality issues, including duplicates, mismatches, and reporting discrepancies. Develop ad hoc reports and analytics to support revenue cycle visibility and business performance. Partner with Finance, IT, Clinical Operations, and Business Leaders to gather reporting requirements and deliver actionable insights. Support Power BI dashboards by validating data, maintaining reports, and collaborating with BI developers on visualization requirements. Assist with data integration initiatives, including future Databricks environments connecting clinical and revenue datasets. Translate business needs into meaningful reporting and analytics solutions. Qualifications 3+ years of Data Analytics experience Advanced SQL skills, including: Query development Stored procedure modification Data validation and troubleshooting Ad hoc reporting Advanced Microsoft Excel skills, including: VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP Pivot Tables IF Statements Text-to-Columns Date Formatting Experience supporting reporting and dashboard initiatives Strong communication skills with the ability to work across technical and non-technical teams Preferred Qualifications Healthcare, Revenue Cycle, Revenue Integrity, Claims, Reimbursement, or Payer Analytics experience Power BI reporting and dashboard maintenance experience Exposure to Databricks Basic VBA/Macro experience Experience working with clinical and financial datasets

jobs.title: Data Engineer - Oracle data integrator and BI
jobs.description: NTT DATA strives to hire exceptional, innovative and passionate individuals who want to grow with us. If you want to be part of an inclusive, adaptable, and forward-thinking organization, apply now. We are currently seeking a Data Engineer - Oracle data integrator and BI to join our team in NA, Texas (US-TX), United States (US). Job Description: Data Engineer - Oracle Data Integrator (ODI) & BI Specialist (Intermediate Level) Project: - Project Sunshine Role Overview We are seeking an Intermediate-Level Data Engineer with expertise in Oracle Data Integrator (ODI) and Business Intelligence (BI) to support the Project Sunshine initiative. This role will focus on designing, developing, and supporting data pipelines and BI solutions that enable reliable, high-quality data delivery for analytics and reporting. Key Responsibilities Data Engineering & Oracle Data Integrator (ODI) Development • Design, develop, and maintain ETL/ELT pipelines using Oracle Data Integrator (ODI) • Build and manage data integration workflows for ingesting and transforming data from multiple sources • Develop reusable data integration components and frameworks • Ensure data pipelines are scalable, reliable, and optimized for performance Data Pipeline Operations & Support • Monitor, troubleshoot, and support production data pipelines (L2/L3 support) • Perform root cause analysis (RCA) and resolve data processing issues • Manage job scheduling, execution, and failure recovery processes • Ensure consistent and timely data availability across platforms Data Modeling & Integration • Support logical and physical data modeling aligned to enterprise standards • Perform source-to-target mapping and define transformation logic • Integrate data across enterprise systems and maintain data consistency • Maintain metadata, data lineage, and documentation for pipelines and models Business Intelligence & Reporting Support • Support BI reporting tools and platforms (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, or similar) • Develop and optimize datasets for reporting and analytics • Collaborate with BI developers to ensure accurate data delivery for dashboards • Support performance optimization for reporting queries and semantic layers Performance Optimization & Data Quality • Optimize ETL processes and query performance to improve efficiency • Implement data quality checks, validation rules, and reconciliation processes • Identify and resolve data anomalies and inconsistencies • Continuously improve pipeline performance and reliability Collaboration & Delivery • Work closely with data architects, DBAs, BI developers, and business stakeholders • Translate business requirements into technical data pipeline solutions • Participate in Agile development processes and sprint cycles • Support data platform modernization initiatives within Project Sunshine Required Qualifications • 3-6 years of experience in Data Engineering, ETL development, or data integration roles • Hands-on experience with Oracle Data Integrator (ODI) • Experience building and supporting enterprise data pipelines • Strong experience working with large, complex datasets Technical Skills • Strong SQL and data integration expertise • Experience with Oracle databases and data platforms • Experience with ETL/ELT tools and pipeline orchestration • Experience with BI tools (Power BI, Tableau, Cognos, or similar) • Familiarity with scripting or programming languages (Python, Shell, etc.) Preferred Qualifications • Experience with cloud data platforms (Azure preferred) • Exposure to data warehousing and dimensional modeling concepts • Experience in healthcare or regulated environments • Experience supporting data modernization or migration initiatives Key Success Metrics • Reliable and efficient data pipeline performance • High-quality data delivery for BI and analytics use cases • Reduced pipeline failures and faster incident resolution • Successful delivery of Project Sunshine data integration milestones About NTT DATA: NTT DATA is a $30 billion trusted global innovator of business and technology services. We serve 75% of the Fortune Global 100 and are committed to helping clients innovate, optimize and transform for long term success. As a Global Top Employer, we have diverse experts in more than 50 countries and a robust partner ecosystem of established and start-up companies. Our services include business and technology consulting, data and artificial intelligence, industry solutions, as well as the development, implementation and management of applications, infrastructure and connectivity. We are one of the leading providers of digital and AI infrastructure in the world. NTT DATA is a part of NTT Group, which invests over $3.6 billion each year in R&D to help organizations and society move confidently and sustainably into the digital future. Visit us at us.nttdata.com NTT DATA endeavors to make https://us.nttdata.com accessible to any and all users. If you would like to contact us regarding the accessibility of our website or need assistance completing the application process, please contact us at https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact-us. This contact information is for accommodation requests only and cannot be used to inquire about the status of applications. NTT DATA is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status. For our EEO Policy Statement, please click here. If you'd like more information on your EEO rights under the law, please click here. For Pay Transparency information, please click here.

jobs.title: IT Services - DATA ENGINEERS
jobs.description: DATA ENGINEERS 5005, WEST ROYAL LANE, SUITE NO 228 IRVING, TX, 75063 Full Time 29-Jun-2026 Design and develop databases, data collection, and data analytics systems. Develop and implement Shell Scripts and dataflow pipeline from various data sources. Create and maintain dashboards and perform data validations. Write SQL queries, stored procedures for data analysis and data manipulation operations. Identify discrepancies in structured and semi structured datasets and resolve the issues. Skills required: Python, Oracle, MongoDB, MYSQL, PL/SQL, Hadoop, Linux, Unix, Teradata and ETL. Bachelor’s degree in Science, Technology or Engineering (any) along with 2 years of experience in the job offered or related occupation is required. Work location: Irving, TX and various unanticipated locations throughout the U.S. Email Resume to HR Dept., Fuge Technologies, Inc., at hr@fugetec.com Should the candidate accept employment with Fuge Technologies, Inc., the referring employee will be eligible to receive an award of $1,000.00 for the successful referral.

jobs.title: AI/ML Engineer
jobs.description: About the Role:- We are seeking a talented and innovative AI/ML Engineer to design, develop, and deploy machine learning and artificial intelligence solutions that solve real-world business problems. The ideal candidate should have strong expertise in machine learning algorithms, data processing, model deployment, and cloud technologies. Key Responsibilities Design, develop, train, and optimize Machine Learning and Deep Learning models. Build and maintain scalable data pipelines for model training and inference. Develop AI-powered applications using NLP, Computer Vision, Generative AI, and predictive analytics techniques. Deploy machine learning models into production environments using MLOps best practices. Work with large datasets and perform data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model evaluation. Collaborate with data engineers, software developers, and business stakeholders to understand requirements and deliver AI solutions. Monitor model performance and implement continuous improvements. Research and evaluate emerging AI technologies, frameworks, and industry trends. Develop APIs and microservices for AI model integration. Ensure data security, model governance, and compliance standards are maintained. Required Qualifications Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Mathematics, Statistics, or a related field. Strong programming skills in Python. Experience with Machine Learning libraries such as: TensorFlow PyTorch Scikit-learn XGBoost Strong understanding of: Supervised and Unsupervised Learning Deep Learning Neural Networks Natural Language Processing (NLP) Computer Vision Reinforcement Learning (preferred) Experience with SQL and NoSQL databases. Knowledge of model deployment frameworks such as Docker, Kubernetes, and MLflow. Experience working with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP. Familiarity with version control systems like Git. Preferred Qualifications Experience with Generative AI technologies and Large Language Models (LLMs). Hands-on experience with: LangChain LlamaIndex Hugging Face OpenAI APIs Vector Databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB, FAISS) Experience in RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) implementations. Knowledge of MLOps tools and CI/CD pipelines. Experience with Databricks and Apache Spark. Technical Skills Python SQL TensorFlow PyTorch Scikit-learn Pandas NumPy Apache Spark MLflow Docker Kubernetes AWS/Azure/GCP Git REST APIs Generative AI & LLMs Soft Skills Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities. Excellent communication and collaboration skills. Ability to work independently and in a team environment. Strong attention to detail and commitment to quality. Nice to Have AI Agent Development Multi-Agent Systems Prompt Engineering Fine-tuning LLMs Knowledge Graphs MLOps Certification Cloud Certifications (AWS, Azure, GCP)

jobs.title: Data Engineer
jobs.description: Pay range: USD $90,000.00 - $105,000.00 / Year Your opportunity At Schwab, you're empowered to make an impact on your career. Here, innovative thought meets creative problem solving, helping us challenge the status quo and transform the finance industry together. We believe in the importance of in-office collaboration and fully intend for the selected candidate for this role to work on site in the specified location(s). In this role, you'll play a meaningful part in supporting business and technology outcomes by partnering across teams to deliver reliable, scalable solutions that enable Schwab's clients and employees. You'll be immersed in an environment that values continuous improvement, thoughtful execution, and accountability, where your ability to analyze needs, apply sound judgment, and collaborate effectively helps move work forward. The opportunity offers exposure to complex initiatives, evolving priorities, and stakeholders across the organization, allowing you to deepen your expertise while contributing to work that matters. What you have Required Qualifications BS in Computer Science or Information Technology or related field 3+ years of experience contributing to cross-functional initiatives in a professional, corporate, or technology-enabled environment Demonstrated ability to apply critical thinking and problem-solving skills to support business or operational objectives Experience communicating clearly and effectively with partners, peers, and stakeholders Ability to manage multiple priorities, adapt to change, and deliver results with strong attention to detail 2+ years of hands-on experience working with AWS or GCP technologies or equivalent (BigQuery, GCS, DataProc etc.) Experienced with Python based ETL frameworks and UNIX/PERL/Python scripting Comfortable with DevOps concepts and Monitoring Tools Solid grasp of computer science fundamentals including data structures and algorithms. Proven ability to evaluate and apply new technologies in a short time. Proven understanding of the full software development lifecycle including testing, continuous integration, and deployment. Preferred Qualifications Experience supporting technology, operations, or shared services teams within a regulated or large-scale organization Exposure to process improvement, data-informed decision making, or continuous improvement practices Experience working collaboratively across teams with differing perspectives or areas of expertise Familiarity with enterprise tools, systems, or workflows that support business execution In addition to the salary range, this role is also eligible for bonus or incentive opportunities. What's in it for you At Schwab, you're empowered to shape your future. We champion your growth through meaningful work, continuous learning, and a culture of trust and collaboration-so you can build the skills to make a lasting impact. Our Hybrid Work and Flexibility approach balances our ongoing commitment to workplace flexibility, serving our clients, and our strong belief in the value of being together in person on a regular basis. We offer a competitive benefits package that takes care of the whole you - both today and in the future: 401(k) with company match and Employee stock purchase plan Paid time for vacation, volunteering, and 28-day sabbatical after every 5 years of service for eligible positions Paid parental leave and family building benefits Tuition reimbursement Health, dental, and vision insurance

jobs.title: Solutions Engineer - Data Visualization
jobs.description: About Us Since 1989, SHI International Corp. has helped organizations change the world through technology. We’ve grown every year since, and today we’re proud to be a $16 billion global provider of IT solutions and services. Over 17,000 Organizations Worldwide Rely On SHI’s Concierge Approach To Help Them Solve What’s Next. But The Heartbeat Of SHI Is Our Employees – All 7,000 Of Them. If You Join Our Team, You’ll Enjoy Our commitment to diversity, as the largest minority- and woman-owned enterprise in the U.S. Continuous professional growth and leadership opportunities. Health, wellness, and financial benefits to offer peace of mind to you and your family. World-class facilities and the technology you need to thrive – in our offices or yours. Job Summary The SHI Services Solutions Engineer, Data Visualization, is a core contributor within our Microsoft Data and AI practice, responsible for designing, developing, and delivering enterprise-grade data visualization and analytics solutions using Microsoft technologies. This role focuses on transforming complex data into clear, accessible, and actionable insights that drive business outcomes. This position is ideal for a technically strong consultant who combines deep Power BI expertise with human-centered design principles and strong client engagement skills. The Solutions Engineer works closely with data engineers, architects, project managers, and client stakeholders to deliver scalable analytics solutions that meet business, accessibility, security, and governance requirements. This job description reflects the organization’s commitment to delivering world-class data visualization solutions that empower clients to unlock the full potential of their data. Candidates who meet these requirements and are passionate about Microsoft technologies, human-centric analytics, and inclusive design are encouraged to apply. Role Description Design and deliver enterprise Power BI analytics solutions, including dashboards, reports, and semantic models, aligned to business objectives and user needs. Leverage Tabular Editor, Power Query, and DAX to create optimized dataflows, semantic models, and complex calculations for scalable analytics solutions. Apply human-centered design (HCD) principles and information design best practices to promote intuitive user experiences and maximize data understanding. Ensure all deliverables align with WCAG 2 or 508 accessibility standards within the tool capabilities, supporting inclusive analytics that align with user needs. Lead discovery sessions and collaborate with architects, data engineers, and client stakeholders to translate business questions into effective analytics solutions. Implement governance, security, and access controls, including Row Level Security and role-based access in compliance with client requirements. Support client adoption through documentation, training, and post-implementation support. Contribute reusable assets, standards, and best practices to the Data and AI consulting practice. Maintain accountability for deliverables, proactively managing risks, dependencies, and quality. Provide ongoing support for post-implementation activities, including troubleshooting, minor adjustments, and client queries. Behaviors and Competencies Presenting: Can design and deliver engaging presentations, adapting the content and style to suit the audience, context, and medium. Negotiation: Can proactively seek out negotiation opportunities, initiate discussions, and contribute to conflict resolution. Communication: Can effectively communicate complex ideas and information to diverse audiences and can facilitate effective communication between others. Detail-Oriented: Can manage complex tasks or projects, identifying errors or inconsistencies, and ensuring all details are addressed, necessary corrections are made, and quality is maintained. Organization: Can effectively coordinate multiple projects, delegate tasks where appropriate, and employ advanced organizational tools and methods. Follow-Up: Can proactively identify tasks that require follow-up, initiate necessary actions, and contribute to efficient workflow management. Problem-Solving: Can proactively identify potential problems, initiate preventive measures, and propose and contribute to innovative solutions. Relationship Building: Can proactively seek out opportunities to expand networks, initiate collaborations, and contribute to team cohesion. Documentation: Can develop comprehensive documentation standards, implement best practices, and ensure documentation supports operational efficiency. Results Orientation: Can set challenging goals for their team and lead them to achieve these goals, demonstrating a consistent track record of results. Skill Level Requirements Bachelor’s degree in Analytics, UX Design, Information Design, Computer Science, or equivalent practical experience. Three or more years of experience delivering enterprise analytics solutions using Power BI, including semantic modeling, DAX, and performance optimization. Strong understanding of data modeling concepts and experience working with relational data sources using SQL or equivalent query languages. Demonstrated application of human centered design principles in analytics or visualization solutions. Experience working in a consulting or enterprise delivery environment with direct client engagement. Ability to independently manage multiple deliverables across concurrent projects. Strong communication skills with the ability to explain technical concepts to both technical and nontechnical audiences. Understanding of data governance, security, and privacy concepts in analytics solutions. Commitment to continuous learning in Microsoft cloud and analytics technologies. Eligible to work in environments handling sensitive government or healthcare data (background check may be required). Commitment to continuous learning and professional development in modern Microsoft cloud technologies and consulting practices. Preferred Skill Level Requirements Microsoft Certified: Power BI Data Analyst Associate (PL 300). Microsoft Fabric Analytics Engineer Associate (DP 600) or obtain within the first year. Experience working with Microsoft Fabric and Azure analytics services. Advanced proficiency with Tabular Editor and semantic model lifecycle management. In-depth understanding of WCAG 2 or 508 accessibility standards and their application in data reporting solutions. Experience creating custom visuals using Deneb or similar frameworks. Familiarity with ETL concepts, dimensional modeling, and enterprise analytics architectures. Experience supporting analytics solutions in regulated or security conscious environments. Familiarity with Microsoft Fabric and its integration with Power BI for advanced analytics. Advanced proficiency in Tabular Editor or similar tools for semantic model design and management. Understanding of data engineering principles, including ETL processes, dimensional modeling, and integration with cloud data platforms. Experience supporting large-scale enterprise data projects, including secure data handling and compliance requirements. Knowledge of Azure Data Lake Storage, Synapse Analytics, Azure Databricks, and related Microsoft cloud ecosystem components. Exposure to data governance practices and the implementation of role-based access controls in analytics solutions. Exposure to managing access to data leveraging Row Level Security (RLS) and role-based access to reporting artifacts through Power BI apps with internal and external stakeholders. Other Requirements Ability to travel to SHI, Partner, and Customer Events. Ability to work independently and as part of a collaborative, cross-functional team. Commitment to continuous learning and professional development in Microsoft technologies and data visualization trends. Strong ethical standards and adherence to data privacy, governance, and security policies. The estimated annual pay range for this position is $144,000 - $169,000 which includes a base salary and bonus. The compensation for this position is dependent on job-related knowledge, skills, experience, and market location and, therefore, will vary from individual to individual. Benefits may include, but are not limited to, medical, vision, dental, 401K, and flexible spending. Equal Employment Opportunity – M/F/Disability/Protected Veteran Status

jobs.title: Data Engineer
jobs.description: TCP is partnered with a fast-growing renewable energy technology company building AI-powered software that helps optimize energy storage and renewable assets in real time. Their platform enables energy traders to make smarter decisions, accelerating the transition to a cleaner, more reliable power grid. We're hiring a Data Engineer to help scale the cloud data platform that powers these trading systems. You'll build production data pipelines in Python, expand cloud infrastructure, and collaborate closely with software engineers, data scientists, and ML teams to deliver reliable, high-performance data systems that support real-time trading and AI-driven decision making. What You'll Do Build and maintain scalable data pipelines and cloud data infrastructure using Python Develop production-ready tooling that supports data engineering, software engineering, and machine learning teams Improve data quality, reliability, and performance across large-scale datasets Enhance orchestration, infrastructure, and cloud platforms using AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and Terraform Collaborate closely with software engineers, data scientists, and ML engineers to support real-time trading systems What We're Looking For 3+ years of professional experience building production data pipelines Strong Python experience with libraries such as Pandas, NumPy, Polars, or Pydantic Experience with AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, and orchestration tools such as Airflow or Prefect Strong SQL skills and experience with relational databases such as PostgreSQL Comfortable working in fast-paced engineering environments and collaborating across software, data, and machine learning teams Experience with cloud-native data platforms and an interest in AI, machine learning, or large-scale distributed systems is a plus Work Style: Hybrid (3 days onsite) Comp : $100k - $130k Base Salary + Healthcare + 401k w/ 5% match + Unlimited PTO PLEASE NOTE SPONSORSHIP WILL NOT BE ABLE TO BE PROVIDED FOR THIS ROLE.

jobs.title: Google Data Engineer
jobs.description: Role: Data Engineer Who You’ll Work With At Slalom we co-create custom software, data, AI, and cloud products with clients who are ready to accelerate their digital transformation. We're passionate about technology, compelled by its potential as we help create the digital products, experiences, and technology-driven organizations that drive true change. We’re thrilled by the opportunity to build the future we want to see, with anyone willing to join us. Slalom's Google Center of Excellence (COE) is focused on injecting intelligence into products, engineering systems that support learning and insight and creating innovative data products. Within Data Engineering we help customers build world-class products through effective use of: Batch and real-time data engineering, including scalable ETL/ELT pipelines using modern cloud-native architectures. Modern data platforms built on Google Cloud, including data lakes,lakehouses, and enterprise data warehouses. Streaming data platforms for real-time ingestion, event-driven architectures, and analytics. Data integration and orchestration using modern workflow and pipeline automation tools. Data platform modernization and migration, helping clients transition legacy data environments to Google Cloud. AI-ready data foundations, ensuring high-quality, governed, and scalable data to support advanced analytics and generative AI use cases. What You’ll Do Slalom Google Data and AI is comprised of passionate, flexible technologists who love to practice and hone their craft. As tools evolve and technologies emerge, we work to stay in front of innovations in data platform development and delivery. As a Data Engineer in Slalom's Google COE, you will work in collaborative teams to design, build, and modernize enterprise data platforms on Google Cloud Platform (GCP). You will deliver solutions using BigQuery, Dataplex, Dataflow, Dataproc, Pub/Sub, Cloud Storage, Vertex AI, Looker, and other Google Cloud services. You will help clients migrate and modernize data estates, implement real-time and batch pipelines, enable governed analytics, and accelerate AI-ready data foundations. You will be engaged to participate in design sessions and be responsible for the timely completion of development items assigned to you in a project backlog. *You will work in a hybrid environment, with expectation to be in-person with Slalom teams and clients as needed. *You also must be within commutable distance to one of Slalom's listed office locations. What You’ll Bring You are passionate about Google Cloud and modern data engineering and continuously expand your skills through hands-on delivery, certifications, and collaboration across the Google COE. You enjoy solving complex data challenges and building scalable, secure, cloud-native platforms. Big Data Platforms (Dataproc, Apache Spark) GoogleBigQuery,BigLake, Cloud SQL Python, Java, SQL Firestore, Bigtable, Spanner, MongoDB Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE), Cloud Run Pub/Sub, Dataflow, Apache Kafka Managed Airflow,dbt,Dataplex Nice to have Looker, Looker Studio Gemini Enterprise, AI, ML Ops About Us Slalom is a fiercely human business and technology consulting company that leads with outcomes to bring more value, in all ways, always. From strategy through delivery, our agile teams across 52 offices in 12 countries collaborate with clients to bring powerful customer experiences, innovative ways of working, and new products and services to life. We are trusted by leaders across the Global 1000, many successful enterprise and mid-market companies, and 500+ public sector organizations to improve operations, drive growth, and create value. At Slalom, we believe that together, we can move faster, dream bigger, and build better tomorrows for all. Compensation and Benefits Slalom prides itself on helping team members thrive in their work and life. As a result, Slalom is proud to invest in benefits that include meaningful time off and paid holidays, parental leave, 401(k) with a match, a range of choices for highly subsidized health, dental, & vision coverage, adoption and fertility assistance, and short/long-term disability. We also offer yearly $350 reimbursement account for any well-being-related expenses, as well as discounted home, auto, and pet insurance. Slalom is committed to fair and equitable compensation practices.The base salary pay range is $100,000 - $115,000 for Consultant, depending on experience. In addition, individuals may be eligible for an annual discretionary bonus. Actual compensation will depend upon an individual’s skills, experience, qualifications, location, and other relevant factors. The salary pay range is subject to change and may be modified at any time. EEO and Accommodations Slalom is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to attracting, developing and retaining highly qualified talent who empower our innovative teams through unique perspectives and experiences. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, disability status, protected veterans’ status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local laws. Slalom will also consider qualified applications with criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. Slalom welcomes and encourages applications from individuals with disabilities. Reasonable accommodations are available for candidates during all aspects of the selection process. Please advise the talent acquisition team if you require accommodations during the interview process.

jobs.title: Data Scientist, Platform
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Airbnb was born in 2007 when two hosts welcomed three guests to their San Francisco home, and has since grown to over 5 million hosts who have welcomed over 2 billion guest arrivals in almost every country across the globe. Every day, hosts offer unique stays and experiences that make it possible for guests to connect with communities in a more authentic way.</span></p></div><p><strong>The Community You Will Join:</strong></p> <p>MarTech Data Science Measurement empowers Airbnb to optimize marketing ROI through data-informed decision-making. We lead the way in defining and advancing best practices for measuring and optimizing marketing impact. We collaborate with Marketing, Finance, Engineering, and Product to provide actionable recommendations and tools based on effective, timely, and granular measurements.</p> <p><strong>The Difference You Will Make:</strong></p> <p>We are seeking experienced Data Scientists to serve as technical anchors across our team’s two pillars. The ideal candidate combines depth in causal inference, experimentation, and customer relationship modeling with the ability to drive rigor in solutions and data-informed decision making across the team and our cross-functional partners.</p> <ul> <li><strong>Actionable:</strong> Deliver insights that drive confident business decisions.</li> <li><strong>Impactful:</strong> Prioritize projects based on their expected value to Airbnb.</li> <li><strong>Balanced:</strong> Adapt methods to business questions and data realities, acknowledging limitations.</li> <li><strong>Rigorous:</strong> Maintain methodological integrity and quantify the sensitivity of findings.</li> <li><strong>Innovative:</strong> Invest in advancing measurement science and developing new methods.</li> <li><strong>Influential:</strong> Share learnings across Airbnb and the broader data science community.</li> </ul> <p><strong>A Typical Day:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Causal Inference:</strong> Apply and develop causal inference methods to estimate the effectiveness of Airbnb’s marketing initiatives.</li> <li><strong>Data Analysis:</strong> Conduct data pulls, analyze trends, and create new features to support measurement efforts.</li> <li><strong>Experimentation:</strong> Design and analyze experiments to evaluate the impact of marketing campaigns.</li> <li><strong>Collaboration:</strong> Work effectively with cross-functional teams, providing insights that optimize marketing strategies.</li> <li><strong>Thought Leadership:</strong> Lead the creation of internal white papers and contribute to Airbnb tech blog posts.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Your Expertise:</strong></p> <ul> <li>PhD in Economics, Statistics, Marketing, or a related field, or a Masters Degree in a similar field with 2+ years of experience.</li> <li>Deep knowledge of causal inference methodologies and experimentation techniques.</li> <li>Proficiency in statistical programming (Python or R), database usage (SQL), and agentic coding.</li> <li>Ability to communicate complex concepts clearly to stakeholders at varying technical levels.</li> <li>Proven track record of solving business problems through data science methods.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Preferred Expertise:</strong></p> <ul> <li>PhD in Economics, Statistics, Marketing, or a related field.</li> <li>Passion for marketing and consumer science, with a desire to stay informed about the latest academic research.</li> <li>Familiarity with Bayesian modeling and its applications in marketing.</li> <li>Experience with causal ML modeling.</li> <li>Experience in developing end-to-end models for data-driven decision-making.</li> </ul> <p><span style="color: #000000; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong>Your Location:</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; color: #000000;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">This position is US - Remote Eligible. The role may include occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager. While the position is Remote Eligible, you must live in a state where Airbnb, Inc. has a registered entity. <a style="color: #000000;" href="https://careers.airbnb.com/">Click here for the up-to-date list of excluded states. This list is continuously evolving, so please check back with us if the state you live in is on the exclusion list</a></span><span style="font-weight: 400;">. If your position is employed by another Airbnb entity, your recruiter will inform you what states you are eligible to work from.</span></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; color: #000000;"><strong>Our Commitment To Inclusion &amp; Belonging:</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; color: #000000;">Airbnb is committed to working with the broadest talent pool possible. We believe diverse ideas foster innovation and engagement, and allow us to attract creatively-led people, and to develop the best products, services and solutions. All qualified individuals are encouraged to apply.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; color: #000000;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">We strive to also provide a disability inclusive application and interview process. If you are a candidate with a disability and require reasonable accommodation in order to submit an application, please contact us at: </span><a style="color: #000000;" href="mailto:reasonableaccommodations@airbnb.com"><span style="font-weight: 400;">reasonableaccommodations@airbnb.com</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;">. Please include your full name, the role you’re applying for and the accommodation necessary to assist you with the recruiting process.&nbsp;</span></span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; color: #000000;">We ask that you only reach out to us if you are a candidate whose disability prevents you from being able to complete our online application.</span></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><span style="font-size: 16px;"><strong><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">How We'll Take Care of You:</span></strong></span></p> <p class="p1"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Our job titles may span more than one career level. The actual base pay is dependent upon many factors, such as: training, transferable skills, work experience, business needs and market demands. The base pay range is subject to change and may be modified in the future. This role may also be eligible for bonus, equity, benefits, and Employee Travel Credits. &nbsp;</span></p></div><div class="title">Pay Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$151,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$175,000 USD</span></div></div></div>
